task: Fix Dependabot auto-merge skipped on synchronize events (issue #475)

Code review approved, yamllint clean, ADR compliance passed, no open dependabot PRs remaining. Committed as fix(ci): use PR author login for Dependabot auto-merge guard.

task: GOAP: Dependabot auto-merge GraphQL rewrite — replace manual check polling + REST pulls.merge() with enablePullRequestAutoMerge(SQUASH) + resolveReviewThread

task: Always-Fix Pre-Existing Issues: GOAP + swarm dispatch for inherited CI failures
notes: Orchestrator: applied the new rule (AGENTS.md) to itself. Retriever identified: (1) Codacy composite action references transitive actions/setup-go@v3 rejected by sha_pinning_required, (2) Codacy CLI fails with 'Missing upload requisites' when CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN absent, (3) .coverage + results.sarif are pre-existing build artifacts polluting working tree, (4) .commandcode/ + .mimocode/ are required at runtime not gitignored, (5) Metrics Conflict Resolver fails to push workflow-file changes due to App token lacking workflows permission (and workflows is not a valid GITHUB_TOKEN scope). Implementer: 5 atomic commits. Verifier: all 11 CI checks green on 9b42d28.

task: Validate: merge all open PRs (#576, #577, #578) and confirm green CI

task: Always-Fix Pre-Existing Issues (round 2): Dependabot + shellcheck audit
notes: Retriever audited 200+ workflow runs and found 3 distinct pre-existing failure classes. Fixed: (1) Dependabot docker/docker-compose/terraform ecosystems removed (no Dockerfiles/Terraform in repo, was emitting weekly 'No Dockerfiles nor Kubernetes YAML found' failure). Verified shellcheck at -S error returns zero findings; the warning-level SC2034 'unused variable' findings are template-stubs that downstream consumers extend, suppressed by the quality gate policy (severity=error). Historical failures (c9074b76, 2288d037, c2307883, 37cf45d1) are on commits no longer on main. Final state: a897977, all 12 checks green.

task: fix(test): handle non-zero exit in --fix test with run
notes: Fixed test 6 in test-analyze-codebase.bats: used bats run helper to capture non-zero exit from run_analyze --fix, verifying side effect (gitignore entry) instead of exit code. BATS wraps test bodies in set -e, causing immediate test failure on intermediate non-zero commands.
